policies.label: Stage Hero Asset Policy
notes: Full-bleed stage images must use background-only assets.
Object-only assets may appear as badges, logos, or secondary product accents only.

policies.label: Quickmenu Icon Family Policy
notes: Quickmenu and tab-entry surfaces must use one consistent icon family.
Promo-complete thumbnails must not be reused as icon shells.

policies.label: Banner Asset Policy
notes: Banner backgrounds should be text-free or image-only surfaces.
Promo-complete banner art must not receive a second text overlay.

policies.label: Commerce Grid Asset Policy
notes: Commerce sections may use product/object imagery directly.
Use promo-complete assets only when they are the complete card content, not a re-overlaid background.

policies.label: Benefit Hub Asset Policy
notes: Benefit hubs should use icons or simple object visuals, not full promo banners.

policies.label: PDP Summary Stage Asset Policy
notes: PDP summary hero surfaces should use product/background imagery without embedded promo text.

policies.label: PDP Sticky Buybox Asset Policy
notes: Sticky buybox should avoid decorative media unless explicitly requested.
